title: Velox — Real-time Chat Platform
description: A production-grade WebSocket chat application handling 10k+ concurrent connections with Go backend, Redis pub/sub, and React frontend. Custom rate limiter prevents spam while maintaining UX.

title: Cerebro — AI Study Companion
description: An AI-powered study tool using spaced repetition and the Feynman technique. RAG pipeline on personal notes generates quiz questions and identifies knowledge gaps automatically.

title: TrailKit — Outdoor Trip Planner
tagline: The map is just the beginning.
description: A full-stack trip planning app with offline PWA support, custom route elevation profiling, and weather integration. Handles complex GPX data parsing and terrain analysis.
